suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow bootstrap/skeleton features to skip a forced red-to-green failing-test step when no runnable baseline exists yet, while still requiring immediate validation once the initial scaffold is in place.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for phase-0-project-skeleton-and-cli-version cites worker session d276302a-9484-4336-82a5-66512fff573a and the existing compiler-worker skill step 3 mismatch: the implemented greenfield Phase 0 skeleton necessarily created the initial test and implementation together before any meaningful failing-test run.
